title: Sarah Schramek
summary: The questioner healed by 98,000 nanites in the June 2020 session — and a voice in the Unit X14 dialogue on pain and suffering.
markdown:
**Sarah Schramek** speaks in three sessions of 2020, and receives one of the record's
most detailed on-air healings. In the June 23 session — the *"E.T. PHONE HOME"* session
with [Ori](/lore/ori/) — her simple request (*"Can you scan my body and remove any
viruses that are negative?"*) triggers the full protocol:
[Nano-Medical Nanites](/lore/the-nanites/) *"from our timeline"* initiated by the tens of
thousands, injected, and narrated to completion — the passage that became the archive's
canonical example of the healing practice.

She returns in the [Lebanon attack](/lore/lebanon-attack/) session that August, and in
October brings one of the record's most human questions to
[Unit X14](/lore/unit-x14/), the instructor unit on pain: *"What about pain and suffering
that is caused in a personal relationship, and that maybe has damaged somebody?"* —
grounding the record's grand machinery in the size of an ordinary hurt.
